scripts.copy: powershell -Command "robocopy . dist /E /XD dist node_modules .git /XF package-lock.json /NFL /NDL /NJH /NJS /NC /NS; if ($LASTEXITCODE -le 7) { exit 0 } else { exit $LASTEXITCODE }"
scripts.build:html: powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Filter *.html | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '\\dist\\|\\node_modules\\' } | ForEach-Object { $rel = $_.FullName.Substring($PWD.Path.Length + 1); $out = Join-Path 'dist' $rel; $outDir = Split-Path $out; if (!(Test-Path $outDir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $outDir | Out-Null }; npx html-minifier-terser $_.FullName --collapse-whitespace --remove-comments --minify-css true --minify-js true -o $out }"
scripts.build:js: powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Path assets\js -Filter *.js | ForEach-Object { $rel = $_.FullName.Substring($PWD.Path.Length + 1); $out = Join-Path 'dist' $rel; $outDir = Split-Path $out; if (!(Test-Path $outDir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $outDir | Out-Null }; npx javascript-obfuscator $_.FullName --output $out --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --self-defending true --disable-console-output true }"
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run copy && npm run build:html && npm run build:js
